message.content:
@startuml
title 七並ベシーケンス図（一周）ver.3

participant "App" as App #D0E8FF
participant "Game" as Game #F5DEB3
participant "Player" as Player #98FB98
participant "View" as View #DDA0DD
participant "TableView" as TableView #FFE4C1
participant "PlayersListView" as PlayersListView #ADD8E6

== ターン進行 ==
activate Game
    startRound() ->> Game : 
        activate Game
        
            startTurn() -->+ Player
            
                [playersList.inPlayを回す]--> +Player
                
                    note over Player:ターン終了
                    
                        render(playersList,table) -->>+ View
                        
                            render(table)->>+ TableView
                            
                                cleanUpPlayersList()->>- Game
                                
                                    isEnd()-[hidden]->- Game
                                    
                                        return boolean--<< -Game
                                        
                                            alt true then endgame else startround endif
                                            
                                                if(true)[true]:endGame();else:false;endif
                                                
                                                    loop while false do nothing done
                                                    
                                                        break exit from current frame of sequence or activity diagram
                                                        
                                                            par parallel processing without synchronization barrier between threads involved in this fragment execution context scope block region area
